item.text: I’m going to locate every `ToolCallRequested`/`ToolCallResult` reference with `rg`, then inspect each hit to separate true construction sites from pattern matches so we only report synthesizing call sites.
I found initial hits, but many are benchmark transcripts and fixtures; next I’m narrowing strictly to Rust source files so we can classify only real construction sites.
I now have the candidate Rust files. I’ll do one more regex sweep for spacing/newline variants to make sure we aren’t missing any nonstandard constructor syntax.
I’ve confirmed the three candidate code files and I’m validating the enum definition file too, to explicitly exclude definitions and match arms from the final list.

item.text:
## Construct sites
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: Constructs both `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested { ... }` (before dispatch, after writing tool input blob) and `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallResult { ... }` (after dispatch, with outcome/output hash/duration) via `sink.emit(&...)` calls.
